brief_html: This is sent every 5 seconds over a UDP broadcast to update the local area network about the game.
format:
(UINT32) Product
(UINT32) Host Counter
(UINT32) Players In Game
(STRING) Game name
(UINT8) Unknown (0)
(STRING) Statstring
(UINT32) Slots total
(UINT8)[] Game Type Info
(UINT32) Slots available
(UINT32) Time since creation
(UINT16) Game Port
remarks_html:
This is sent every 5 seconds over a UDP broadcast to update the local area network about the game.

This is also sent when a client clicks on the game in a list.
